title: eustachya alba
intro: Eustachya alba, also known as White Eustachya, is a plant species in the family Acanthaceae, native to tropical Africa. Traditionally, the plant is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds that can help alleviate various health issues. The health benefits of Eustachya alba include treating fever, wounds, and skin conditions, as well as providing relief from respiratory problems such as bronchitis and coughs. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for consumption, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human use.
